# Aria Han

> Builder, writer, researcher. Agent memory, verification, model familiarity, and tools that protect attention.

## Core
- [About](https://ariaxhan.com/about): background, focus areas, current work
- [Writing](https://ariaxhan.com/writing): essays on agents, memory, model behavior, and what breaks in real work
- [Open Source](https://ariaxhan.com/open-source): KERNEL, the-agent-library, llm-bench, model familiarity, memory, and diagnostics
- [Systems](https://ariaxhan.com/systems): free solo dev apps, coordination systems, and memory tools
- [Timeline](https://ariaxhan.com/timeline): project and company milestones
- [Hackathons](https://ariaxhan.com/hackathons): hackathon wins, builds under pressure
- [Contact](https://ariaxhan.com/contact): how to reach me

## Agent Resources
- [llms-full.txt](https://ariaxhan.com/llms-full.txt): full concatenated content
- [Agent Card](https://ariaxhan.com/.well-known/agent-card.json)
- [MCP Server Card](https://ariaxhan.com/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json)
- [API Catalog](https://ariaxhan.com/.well-known/api-catalog)
- [Agent Skills](https://ariaxhan.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json)

## Preferences
- ai-train: no
- ai-input: yes (cite source)
